# Modulo Assignment

Modulo assignment operator

```perl
$total %= $modulus;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$total %= $modulus;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$total %= $modulus;
```
